title: 11 Herbal Teas for Shift Workers to Combat Insomnia and Fatigue
description: Ginkgo biloba teas have been used to help with insomnia due to their unique combination of properties and constituents. The leaves of the ginkgo biloba tree contain flavonoids, terpenoids, and bilobalide, which work together to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality. The flavonoids, particularly quercetin and kaempferol, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help to reduce stress and anxiety, common causes of insomnia.
